name: Skip Ceres + Intro
description: New game starts directly at Landing Site ship, skipping Ceres station and intro sequence.

name: Respin
description: Press jump while airborne to re-enter spin jump. Full ASM respin from MapRandomizer.

name: Fast Doors
description: Door transitions run twice per frame, cutting transition time in half.

name: Momentum Conservation
description: Preserve horizontal momentum when landing while running (speedkeep).

name: Energy-Free Shinesparks
description: Shinesparks no longer cost energy or require 30+ HP to activate.

name: No Low Energy Beeping
description: Silences the low-energy warning beep sound.

name: Fast Saves
description: Skip save confirmation dialog and speed up save/energy/missile station animations.

name: Fast Pause Menu
description: Speed up pause menu transitions and enable diagonal map scrolling.

name: Enable Moonwalk
description: Moonwalk is enabled by default on new game.

name: Fast Mother Brain Cutscene
description: Speed up the Mother Brain fight cutscenes dramatically.

name: Fast Big Boy Cutscene
description: Speed up the baby metroid 'big boy' growth cutscene.

name: Fast Elevators
description: Elevators move 3x faster in all directions.

name: Vanilla Bugfixes
description: Fixes multiple vanilla game bugs and crashes (eye door, speed echoes, GT code, morph ball PLM, etc.).

name: Disable Walljump
description: Walljumping is completely disabled.

name: Missile Refill All
description: Save/energy stations refill all ammo types to max (missiles, supers, power bombs) in one touch.

name: Skip Intro (Start at Ceres)
description: Skips the intro cinematic but starts at Ceres station. Play through Ceres and escape to Zebes. Use with Ceres Enable for full Ceres access.

name: Ceres Enable
description: Enables Ceres station as a playable area. Use with Skip Intro (Start at Ceres) to start at Ceres instead of Zebes.

name: Fix Choot Null Jump
description: Fixes a bug in Thread the Needle room where jump calculation during door transition can be interrupted by IRQ.

name: Fix Dust Torizo
description: Fixes bugs in the Dust Torizo (Golden Torizo) fight.

name: Fix Water FX Bug
description: Fixes water/lava visual effects bugs.

name: Fix Horizontal Doors
description: Fixes horizontal door transition issues.

name: Fix Hyper Beam Slowlock
description: Fixes hyper beam slowdown/lock-up bugs.

name: Fast Reload
description: Speeds up the load game / reload time.

name: E-Tank Refill Full
description: Energy stations refill energy to 100% in one touch.

name: Energy Station Reserves
description: Energy stations also refill reserve tanks.

name: Aim Anything
description: Allows aiming in directions not normally possible (e.g. while in morph ball).

name: Complementary Suits
description: Alternate suit color schemes (Varia, Gravity) with complementary colors.

name: Boss: Kraid Defeated
description: New game starts with Kraid already defeated. Allows Tourian access when combined with other boss patches.

name: Boss: Phantoon Defeated
description: New game starts with Phantoon already defeated. Allows Tourian access when combined with other boss patches.

name: Boss: Draygon Defeated
description: New game starts with Draygon already defeated. Allows Tourian access when combined with other boss patches.

name: Boss: Ridley Defeated
description: New game starts with Ridley already defeated. Allows Tourian access when combined with other boss patches.

name: All Bosses Defeated (Tourian Unlocked)
description: New game starts with all four bosses (Kraid, Phantoon, Draygon, Ridley) defeated. Tourian gate opens immediately. Combine with Skip Intro for quick Tourian access.
